Off Calendar Oct-20-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: V. Mack/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Jonathan Peter Marvin, Esq. for Plaintiff Levi Strauss & Co.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Millenuium Internet Research & Development Corp.
Principal of $63,208.21
Attorney's fees of $3,572.90
Costs of $795.85
Interest of $13,367.38
For the total of $80,944.34
Counsel to prepare judgment.

Default Prove-Up
